Drop completely empty rows or rows missing the target variable 'Churn'\ntrain_df = train_df.dropna(subset=['Churn'])\ntest_df = test_df.dropna(subset=['Churn'])\n\n\n# 2. Fill remaining missing feature values if any exist\nfor col in train_df.columns:\n    if train_df[col].dtype in ['int64', 'float64']:\n        median_val = train_df[col].median()\n        train_df[col] = train_df[col].fillna(median_val)\n        test_df[col] = test_df[col].fillna(median_val)\n    elif train_df[col].dtype == 'object' and col != 'CustomerID':\n        mode_val = train_df[col].mode()[0]\n        train_df[col] = train_df[col].fillna(mode_val)\n        test_df[col] = test_df[col].fillna(mode_val)\n\n#\ncontract_mapping = {'Monthly': 1, 'Quarterly': 6, 'Annual': 12}\nsub_mapping = {'Premium': 1, 'Standard': 2, 'Basic': 3}\ngender_mapping = {'Male': 0, 'Female': 1}\n\nfor df in [train_df, test_df]:\n    df['Contract Length'] = df['Contract Length'].map(contract_mapping)\n    df['Subscription Type'] = df['Subscription Type'].map(sub_mapping)\n    df['Gender'] = df['Gender'].map(gender_mapping)\n\n# 4. Separate Features (X) and Target (y)\nX_train = train_df.drop(columns=['CustomerID', 'Churn'])\ny_train = train_df['Churn']\nX_test = test_df.drop(columns=['CustomerID', 'Churn'])\ny_test = test_df['Churn']\n\n# 5. Identify Column Types automatically (Now they are all numeric!)\nnumeric_features = X_train.select_dtypes(include=['int64', 'float64']).columns.tolist()\ncategorical_features = X_train.select_dtypes(include=['object', 'category']).columns.tolist()\n\nprint(f\"Numeric columns to scale: {numeric_features}\")\nprint(f\"Categorical columns remaining to encode: {categorical_features}\")\n\n# 6. Build Preprocessing Transformers\nnumeric_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[\n    ('scaler', StandardScaler())\n])\n\n# Since all features are mapped to numbers now, we just pass numeric features through the scaler\npreprocessor = ColumnTransformer(\n    transformers=[\n        ('num', numeric_transformer, numeric_features)\n    ])\n\nprint(\"\\nPreprocessing pipeline updated with manual mappings successfully!\")","metadata":{"trusted":true,"execution":{"iopub.status.busy":"2026-06-23T13:12:04.641614Z","iopub.execute_input":"2026-06-23T13:12:04.642158Z","iopub.status.idle":"2026-06-23T13:12:05.062007Z","shell.execute_reply.started":"2026-06-23T13:12:04.642129Z","shell.execute_reply":"2026-06-23T13:12:05.061253Z"}},"outputs":[{"name":"stdout","text":"Numeric
